programme.title: It's Suppertime!: Pork So Good, You Might Actually Die
programme.desc: Mastering crispy, fatty porchetta with grilled garlic rapini, perfect roasted potatoes and spicy bomba sauce.

programme.title: F... That's Delicious
programme.desc: The crew visits Copenhagen for the Roskilde Festival, where Action makes his own Octopus Taco Meyhem cooks fish Al tries hard to behave himself.

programme.title: F... That's Delicious
programme.desc: Action shoots a video featuring Big Body Bes on a white horse when not engaged in equine rap scenarios, the two eat their way from West Hollywood to Watts.

programme.title: F... That's Delicious
programme.desc: Soul food, explosive chicken, a love-filled Burmese restaurant, inventive California cuisine and beer.

programme.title: F... That's Delicious
programme.desc: Action heads to the diverse culinary city of Chicago to try everything on offer, from Michelin-starred restaurants to Polish cultural festivals.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz considers buying a $11,400 motorized surfboard, $20,000 fishing rod, and a $350,000 truck for his lakeside house a chat with models in a $25,000 floating hot tub.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz is joined by his three kids to kick it at a $35M home, where they check out some pricey pogo sticks, beauty pageants and dog cloning.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz checks the collection of rims from Forgiato he scopes out a $1.5M RV and a military tank the Drench God lays down bars on a portable studio.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz hangs out at The Palms Hotel in a room worth $50K per night Trappy reviews a $10K leather jacket made for dogs.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz and Lil Duval explore a weed supercenter in Vegas sitting down at a $100K table at Drai's Top Shelf Budtending and a smart weed grinder.
